curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modified only JaxbEngine.java. The fromString method used JAXB Unmarshaller.unmarshal() on a raw StringReader without disabling external entities. The fix creates an XMLInputFactory with IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES set to false and uses an XMLStreamReader for unmarshalling. Sibling content-type engines (XstreamEngine, JacksonXmlEngine) use different XML libraries with different security models and do not share the same JAXB-based vulnerability pattern. Pre-assigned class xxe confirmed — CWE-611 and the patch both clearly indicate XXE.
